name: Arif Hossain
bio: Met at BUET during freshman year. We used to solve DSA problems together at 2am. Now he's a software engineer at a Dhaka startup.

name: Nusrat Jahan
bio: Grew up in the same lane in Mirpur. She's been my best friend since class 3. Now studying pharmacy at DU.

name: Tanvir Ahmed
bio: College batchmate from Notre Dame. We bonded over cricket and FIFA tournaments. Currently doing his MBA in Chittagong.

name: Sabrina Akter
bio: Met in a UI/UX workshop during second year. She introduced me to Figma and design thinking. Works as a freelance designer now.

name: Rakibul Islam
bio: Fellow bootcamp student. We grind through React and JavaScript problems together almost every week. Huge motivation for each other.

name: Mehjabin Chowdhury
bio: We were bench partners in class 6 at Viqarunnisa. Lost touch after she moved to Sylhet. Reconnected on Facebook last year.

name: Fahim Shahriar
bio: We co-founded a small campus food delivery app that flopped spectacularly. Still laugh about it. He's now building his second startup.

name: Priya Das
bio: Met at an inter-college cultural fest. She plays sitar beautifully. We stay in touch through shared Spotify playlists and voice notes.

name: Imran Kabir
bio: Senior dev I met at a tech meetup in Banani. He mentored me on Node.js and system design. I owe him a lot of chai and conversations.

name: Lamia Sultana
bio: Hostel neighbour during first year. We went on a spontaneous trip to Cox's Bazar with zero planning. Best memories from uni.
